commands.name: project
commands.description: Manages projects in Lino CLI.

commands.name: new
commands.description: Starts a new .NET project with a full structure.

commands.name: list
commands.description: Lists projects already created with Lino.

commands.name: service
commands.description: Manages services within the project.

commands.name: new
commands.description: Creates a new service — simple or modularized.

commands.name: list
commands.description: Lists services already created in the project.

commands.name: module
commands.description: Manages modules in modularized services.

commands.name: new
commands.description: Creates a new module within a modularized service.

commands.name: list
commands.description: Lists existing modules in the current service.

commands.name: entity
commands.description: Manages entities within the service or module.

commands.name: new
commands.description: Creates a new domain entity.

commands.name: edit
commands.description: Edits properties or settings of an existing entity.

commands.name: list
commands.description: Lists all entities in a service or module.

commands.name: enumeration
commands.description: Manages enumerations.

commands.name: new
commands.description: Creates an enumeration in the domain layer.

commands.name: edit
commands.description: Edits an existing enumeration.

commands.name: list
commands.description: Lists enumerations available in the service or module.

commands.name: value-object
commands.description: Manages value objects.

commands.name: new
commands.description: Creates a value object in the domain.

commands.name: edit
commands.description: Edits an existing value object.

commands.name: list
commands.description: Lists value objects related to the current context.

commands.name: query
commands.description: Manages queries.

commands.name: new
commands.description: Creates a new query in the application layer.

commands.name: list
commands.description: Lists queries defined for an entity.

commands.name: command
commands.description: Manages commands.

commands.name: new
commands.description: Creates a new command in the application layer.

commands.name: list
commands.description: Lists commands associated with an entity.

commands.name: api
commands.description: Manages APIs.

commands.name: new
commands.description: Creates a new API within the selected service or module.

commands.name: list
commands.description: Lists all APIs linked to the current entity or context.

commands.name: web-app
commands.description: Manages web applications.

commands.name: new
commands.description: Adds a web application to the project.

commands.name: page
commands.description: Manages web pages.

commands.name: new
commands.description: Generates a new page within the project.

commands.name: list
commands.description: Lists pages linked to an entity.

commands.name: event
commands.description: Manages events.

commands.name: new
commands.description: Creates a domain or integration event.

commands.name: list
commands.description: Lists events associated with the entity.

commands.name: event-handler
commands.description: Manages event handlers.

commands.name: new
commands.description: Creates a new event handler.

commands.name: list
commands.description: Lists all handlers linked to events in the current context.

commands.name: feature
commands.description: Manages global project features.

commands.name: background-job
commands.description: Manages support for background task processing.

commands.name: add
commands.description: Adds support for background task processing.

commands.name: auth
commands.description: Manages authentication and authorization settings.

commands.name: add
commands.description:
Adds full authentication and authorization support to the 
project.

commands.name: database
commands.description: Manages the full lifecycle of database migrations.

commands.name: new
commands.description: Generates a new database migration.

commands.name: apply
commands.description:
Applies pending migrations in the specified service or 
module.

commands.name: revert
commands.description: Reverts the last applied migration.

commands.name: list
commands.description:
Lists migrations that have been applied or are pending in 
the selected context.

commands.name: version
commands.description: Manages service versions.

commands.name: show
commands.description: Shows the current version of a specific service.

commands.name: list
commands.description:
Lists the current versions of all services and web 
applications.

commands.name: bump
commands.description:
Increments the version of a service or web application 
following semantic versioning (SemVer).

commands.name: build
commands.description:
Builds the defined services and web applications and generates 
their Docker images.

commands.name: user
commands.description: Manages users in the tool.

commands.name: register
commands.description: Registers a new user via CLI.

commands.name: auth
commands.description: Manages user authentication features.

commands.name: login
commands.description: Logs the user into the Lino CLI.

commands.name: logout
commands.description: Logs the user out of the tool.

commands.name: preferences
commands.description: Manages the user’s global preferences in the CLI.

commands.name: culture
commands.description: Manages the CLI’s default language/culture.

commands.name: set

options.name: --name
options.description:
en | pt | es | de | fr | it | ja | ko | ru | 
zh

commands.description: Changes the current language/culture used by the tool.
